org.docgene.model

Interface ElementReference

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    ArticleReference, ExternalLink, ImageReference, ParagraphArticleReference
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractAPI, AbstractLink, AbstractMoreInfoRef, AbstractWikiLink, ArticlesGlossary.Word, XMLArchiveURL, XMLAudio, XMLCategoryReference, XMLCitation, XMLDotNetAPI, XMLDoxygenAPI, XMLExtendedImage, XMLExternalLink, XMLImage, XMLInclude, XMLJavaAPI, XMLMailLink, XMLMediawikiLink, XMLMessageBox, XMLMoreInfo, XMLMoreInfoRef, XMLPythonAPI, XMLQtAPI, XMLRedirect, XMLReference, XMLResource, XMLSeeAlso, XMLSeeAlsoHeading, XMLSeeArticle, XMLVideo, XMLWikipediaLink

    public interface ElementReference
    Represents a reference to an element.
    Since:
    1.5.6.1

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Default Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      int getLineNumber()
      Return the line where the reference appear.
      default boolean hasLineNumber()
      Return true if this reference has a line number.

    • Method Detail

      • getLineNumber

        int getLineNumber()
        Return the line where the reference appear.
        Returns:
        the line number

      • hasLineNumber

        default boolean hasLineNumber()
        Return true if this reference has a line number.
        Returns:
        true if this reference has a line number
